howToGetApiKey: How to get my API Key?
howToGetApiKeyTitle: How to get your Gemini API Key (Free)
apiKeyHelpIntro: To evaluate your exam at no cost, you need to use your own access key. It takes just 30 seconds:
apiKeyStep2: Sign in with your Google account.
apiKeyStep3: In the left sidebar, click the "Get API key" button.
apiKeyStep4: Click "Create API key in new project".
apiKeyStep5: Copy the key (starts with AIza...) and paste it into the settings box on our page.
